title: Files Permission settings via Box & Sharepoint
excerpt: Hello! I have a question regarding the file uploads specifically the “Box” vs. “OneDrive & SharePoint” options: Does anyone know if the permissions of the native file have an impact on how it’s accessed by other monday.c…

posts.author: Nataliaru (Natalia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I have a question regarding the file uploads specifically the “Box” vs. “OneDrive & SharePoint” options: Does anyone know if the permissions of the native file have an impact on how it’s accessed by other monday.com users? (e.g. if it’s in someone’s personal “my files” vs. collaborative folders)?
